subject: Two anime-style noble antagonist brothers — one in a blue cape and formal attire (left), one in a red cape and formal attire (right) — facing each other in a posed, theatrical stance.
description: Two humanoid anime-style figures stand facing each other in a composed, dramatic pose. The figure on the left wears blue formal attire with a long cape and has light blond hair styled upward. The figure on the right wears red formal attire with a cape and has darker, slicked-back hair. Both wear elaborate, aristocratic-style clothing suggesting nobility or pompous self-importance. Their body language is theatrical and slightly confrontational. The background is light and plain, keeping focus on the pair's color-coded contrast. The card is a Supporter type, confirming these are named human characters from the Pokemon IP.
foreground: two formally dressed anime figures in contrasting blue and red, facing each other
emotion: theatrical, pompous, confrontational — both figures projecting self-importance
